entities.name: Aviato
entities.context: External API/service for contact intelligence; call history logged to N5/logs/aviato_usage.jsonl

entities.name: stakeholder_intel.py
entities.context: Canonical script for joining CRM + LinkedIn + Aviato data; located at N5/scripts/

entities.name: CRM markdown
entities.context: Source of truth for person identity; stored as profiles in N5/crm_v3/profiles/*.yaml

entities.name: crm_v3.db
entities.context: Database component of enrichment infrastructure at N5/data/

entities.name: LinkedIn
entities.context: External data source joined via stakeholder_intel.py

entities.name: Kondo
entities.context: Viewer system paired with stakeholder_intel.py for read-only CRM operations

entities.name: enrichment_queue
entities.context: Queue managed by Enrichment/Orchestration side for processing enrichment tasks

entities.name: Intelligence Logs
entities.context: Logs within CRM markdown updated by enrichment operations

entities.name: Viewer/Kondo side
entities.context: Architectural boundary for read-only operations; may enhance views but not manage enrichment

entities.name: Enrichment/Orchestration side
entities.context: Architectural boundary for write operations; may call Aviato and update CRM but not bypass canonical joins

entities.name: backward-compatibility
entities.context: Principle requiring new CRM markdown fields to not break existing consumers

relationships.context: Canonical join method for CRM data
May enhance output and prompts but must use for all joins
May call Aviato API for enrichment
Kondo is the viewer component of this architectural side
